reasoning: As of August 21, 2025, the Polymarket probability for this event was 18% ($0.18), indicating that Solana had not yet dipped to $150 during the month of August and there was only an 18% chance it would do so before the end of the month. Because the price moved significantly higher, away from the $150 mark in the final third of the month, the likelihood of a 30% crash back to $150 in the final two days of August is exceedingly low. The single source citing a $138-$220 range appears to be an AI-generated technical prediction rather than an observed low, especially since the market remained open at 0.18 on Aug 21. Given the recent price action near $200+ going into the final days of the month, we can confidently assign a very low probability.
